subcodes.title: Words spoken at the examination in Tabriz
subcodes.first_line: I am, I am, I am the promised One! I am the One whose name you have for a thousand years invoked
subcodes.subjects: @grammatical and other discrepancies in the Sacred Writings, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment
